name: prototype-to-product
description: Hardens a working prototype into a pre-release product. Ships a phased workflow — assess-prototype builds a HARDENING.md gap ledger, define-release-target sets the pre-release bar (extending SPEC.md if present) and prioritizes the ledger against it, convert-prototype works the ledger down one item per commit. Loads HARDENING.md and the hardening standing rules at session start, and reminds before wrap-up to keep the ledger current. Activates only once a HARDENING.md exists.

interface.shortDescription: Harden a prototype into a pre-release product
interface.longDescription: A phased workflow for turning a working prototype into a pre-release product. assess-prototype analyzes the prototype and builds a HARDENING.md gap ledger (what is prototype-grade vs product-grade). define-release-target sets what pre-release means for this product — extending SPEC.md if the agentic-workflow plugin is in use rather than restating it — and prioritizes the ledger against that bar. convert-prototype works the ledger down incrementally, one hardening item per commit. Loads HARDENING.md and the hardening standing rules at session start, and gives a non-blocking reminder before wrap-up to keep the ledger current. Activates only once a HARDENING.md exists — enable or disable independently of the other workflows.
